features.label: Modular Directory Structure
features.desc: Base64 tool split into tools/base64/ directory with 4 components: utils.js, text.js, image.js, file.js, index.js.

features.label: Auto-detect Mode
features.desc: Paste anything → auto-detects plain text, Base64, or URL-safe Base64.

features.label: URL-safe Base64
features.desc: Encode/decode URL-safe Base64 (+ → -, / → _, no padding). Essential for JWT tokens.

features.label: Chunked Output (MIME)
features.desc: Wrap Base64 output at 76 characters per line — MIME standard.

features.label: Size Info + Validation
features.desc: Shows original vs encoded size with overhead %. Live validation badge.

features.label: Image Embed Code Generator
features.desc: Load any image → generates HTML img tag, CSS background, JSON embed, Markdown, or raw Base64.

features.label: Any File Encode/Decode
features.desc: Encode any file (PDF, ZIP, binary) to Base64. Decode Base64 back to file.

features.label: Download Outputs
features.desc: Download encoded Base64 as .txt file, download decoded file directly.

features.label: Live Encode on Type
features.desc: Toggle live encoding as you type. Swap button flips input/output.
